description: Flowline failure — brine release to bare soil, approximate 420 BBL. Caliche surface affected. Operator self-reported within 24h.
Tank battery overflow during high-volume pump operation. Approx 210 BBL produced water reached unpaved lease road and adjacent soil.
Pipeline rupture at weld joint. 850 BBL produced brine released across ~0.4 acres of rangeland. Soil remediation initiated.
Stuffing box failure on production wellhead. 115 BBL brine released, contained within lease.
High-pressure disposal line failure. 1,200 BBL produced water impacted approximately 0.8 acres of rangeland adjacent to lease road. Remediation crew deployed within 48h.
Produced water impoundment berms overtopped during heavy rainfall event. 340 BBL released off-pad.
Gathering system pipe rupture. Large-volume produced water release. 2,800 BBL estimated. Confirmed by aerial survey. Soil and vegetation mortality documented within 1.1 acres.
Production separator overflow. 760 BBL brine released, partially recovered. Impacted soil samples showed elevated chloride levels.
Flex hose connection failure on produced water transfer truck. 490 BBL released on location.
Injection well annulus failure — surface casing vent flow of produced water. Estimated 1,540 BBL released before mechanical intervention.
